first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations, and the mean delta across all runs is zero. The textual differences in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections are minor rephrasings and slight shifts in emphasis that are consistent with normal run-to-run variation. There is no new reasoning or judgment introduced that can be tied to the change in location from Berlin to San Francisco.
